summary: Optimized hasBraces with explicit early exit when opening brace not found. 4.0% performance improvement.

Added typeof checks before String() coercion in 6 hot paths. The ternary operator overhead offsets savings from avoiding redundant String() calls. Optimized version performed slightly worse (avg 1,363,235 ops/sec) than baseline (avg 1,378,209 ops/sec).

Replaced [].concat() with Array.isArray() checks to avoid copying when inputs are already arrays. However, the conditional overhead negated any benefit. Optimized version: 1,355,507 ops/sec vs baseline: 1,392,413 ops/sec (2.6% regression).

Added hasBraces check to skip braces expansion in parse() function. However, parse() is not called in the hot paths tested by benchmarks (makeRe, isMatch, match all call picomatch directly). The conditional check added overhead without providing benefit. Optimized: 1,331,017 ops/sec vs baseline: 1,387,237 ops/sec (4.0% regression).
